ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "global_num" INTEGER /* Global number assigned to the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the patient */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group of the patient */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the patient is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the patient is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the patient is located */,
  "infection_case" TEXT /* Type of infection case (e.g., overseas inflow, contact with patient) */,
  "infection_order" INTEGER /* Order of infection (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "infected_by" INTEGER /* Patient ID of the person who infected this patient (if applicable) */,
  "contact_number" INTEGER /* Contact number for the patient */,
  "symptom_onset_date" TEXT /* Date when symptoms first appeared */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was confirmed to have COVID-19 */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was released from treatment */,
  "deceased_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient deceased (if applicable) */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the patient (e.g., released, hospitalized) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID for whom the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., PCR, antibody) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test (e.g., symptoms, medical history) */,
  "test_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID for whom the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered (e.g., medication, hospitalization) */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., recovered, hospitalized) */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the treatment (e.g., medication dosage, hospitalization duration) */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication administered to the patient */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID who reported the symptom */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was reported */,
  "symptom_type" TEXT /* Type of symptom reported (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID who the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare worker */,
  "worker_role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare worker (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "worker_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the healthcare worker is employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_worker_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID who the worker is assigned to */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Healthcare worker ID who is assigned to the patient */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_worker_assignments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_worker_assignments_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES healthcare_workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_facility_admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID who was admitted */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Facility ID where the patient was admitted */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_facility_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_facility_admissions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the study started */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the study ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_study_participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID who participated in the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Study ID of the study the patient participated in */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient participated in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_study_participations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_study_participations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)
